mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.follow_user_id, f.create_time, u.nickname as follow_user_name, u.avatar as follow_user_avatar FROM sys_user_follow f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.follow_user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC

SELECT f.id, f.user_id, f.follow_user_id, f.create_time, u.nickname as follow_user_name, u.avatar as follow_user_avatar FROM sys_user_follow f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follow_user_id = #{followUserId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_follow (user_id, follow_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{followUserId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND follow_user_id = #{followUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_follow WHERE follow_user_id = #{followUserId}
